textEn: Ordering at a coffee shop. Good morning. Can I get a coffee, please?
textZh: 在咖啡店点单。早上好，可以给我来杯咖啡吗？

textEn: What type of coffee would you like? I'll have a cappuccino, please
textZh: 您要什么类型的咖啡呢？我要一杯卡布奇诺。

textEn: Would you like it for here or to go? I'll have it to go, please
textZh: 是堂食还是外带呢？请帮我打包带走吧。

textEn: Actually, can I also get a chocolate chip muffin of?
textZh: 其实我还想再要一个巧克力豆玛芬。

textEn: Course one chocolate chip muffin anything else
textZh: 一份巧克力豆玛芬，还有别的吗？

textEn: Just the cappuccino and the muffin, please
textZh: 就是卡布奇诺和玛芬，谢谢。

textEn: Alright, that will be eight dollars
Your order will be ready in just a few minutes
textZh: 你点的餐几分钟就好了

textEn: Thanks for watching if you enjoyed this video, please give it a like and consider subscribing to my channel for more content like this
textZh: 如果你喜欢这个视频，请点赞并考虑订阅我的频道以获取更多类似内容
